title: The Front Gate Falls
description: The rescue force reaches Enies Lobby, where the island’s guards and government agents prepare to stop the Straw Hats.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Kumadori, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. The rescue force reaches Enies Lobby, where the island’s guards and government agents prepare to stop the Straw Hats.

dialogue.speaker: Kumadori
dialogue.text: So, iceburg's still hanging in there...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: My master sacrificed his own life...

dialogue.speaker: Kumadori
dialogue.text: It's not enough for me to escape,

dialogue.speaker: Kumadori
dialogue.text: You're the only one who's in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That, alone, is never a crime!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What was that giant frog about!!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It smacked the rocket man away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Regardless, we have to keep going!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kumadori
dialogue.text: We gotta rescue our bro, frankly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's another pair of disconnected cars!!

summary: The rescue force reaches Enies Lobby, where the island’s guards and government agents prepare to stop the Straw Hats.
